ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the meeting */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the meeting */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the meeting (e.g., scheduled, cancelled) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department organizing the meeting */,
  "agenda_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated agenda */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or virtual location of the meeting */,
  "public_access" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the meeting is accessible to the public */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the meeting */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the meeting */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the meeting was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_agenda_id FOREIGN KEY ("agenda_id") REFERENCES agendas ("agenda_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the department */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the department record was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the department record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agendas" (
  "agenda_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agenda */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated meeting */,
  "agenda_items" TEXT /* List of agenda items covered in the meeting */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the agenda */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the agenda */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the agenda was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agenda_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agendas_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agendas_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agendas_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "minutes" (
  "minutes_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of minutes */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated meeting */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the minutes were created */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the minutes document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the minutes */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the minutes */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the minutes were last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("minutes_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_minutes_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_minutes_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_minutes_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_records" (
  "audio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio record */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated meeting */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the audio recording */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the audio recording */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Date when the audio was uploaded */,
  "file_size" TEXT /* Size of the audio file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the audio */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the audio record */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the audio record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_records_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_records_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_records_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated meeting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., council member, staff, public) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the participant */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the participant record */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the participant record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the role was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated meeting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user performing the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_logs_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated meeting */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant attending the meeting */,
  "status" TEXT /* Attendance status (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "time_in" TEXT /* Time the participant signed in */,
  "time_out" TEXT /* Time the participant signed out */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who recorded the attendance */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the attendance record */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the attendance record was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated meeting */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "sent_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sent the notification */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the notification */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the notification */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the notification was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_sent_by FOREIGN KEY ("sent_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated meeting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* User's comments on the meeting */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating for the meeting (1-5 stars) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the feedback */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the feedback */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag (e.g., zoning, planning) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the tag */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the tag was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meeting_tags" (
  "meeting_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting-tag association */,
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated meeting */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the meeting-tag association */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the meeting-tag association */,
  "last_modified_at" TEXT /* Date when the meeting-tag association was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_tags_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meeting_tags_meeting_id FOREIGN KEY ("meeting_id") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_id")
)
